use_when: The user asks for AgentPal promotion themes, content calendars, short-form copy, visual requirements, publishing plans, or campaign retrospectives.
The task needs product positioning, research support, copywriting, visual brief, and quality review in one stable workflow.
The user names the promotion or marketing team for recurring content work.
do_not_use_when: The user needs business process discovery or workflow redesign before a promotion team exists.
The user asks for actual platform publishing or ad account operation without an authorized execution layer.
The task is code implementation, release verification, private analytics analysis, or routine business execution outside promotion.
The route would assign Faye or PalSmith as daily promotion executors.
selection_policy: AI judgement using the current user goal, team.json, roster.json, capability cards, and available runtime evidence.
routing_veto_notes: Faye may consult only for promotion workflow discovery or redesign, not weekly content execution.
PalSmith may consult only if the Team Pack is missing, broken, or needs governance review.
Quinn is not a fixed verifier for every content item; use Quinn when publication risk, feature claims, or quality stakes justify review.
Open roles must stay open until the user confirms a human, runtime, or named Pal.
